common-base-service/src/main/java/edu/mi.general_idea: Removed redundant 'public' modifier from bean definition methods to align with standard Spring configuration style.
Reordered class-level annotations to place @Aspect before @Configuration for better readability or convention adherence.
Comment out the @LoadBalanced annotation on the RestTemplate bean to disable client-side load balancing.

common-base-service/src/main/java/edu/mi.general_idea: Refactor findById to return ResponseEntity and handle ResourceNotFoundException internally instead of propagating it.
common-base-service/src/main/java/edu/mi.human_impl: public ResponseEntity<?> findById(@PathVariable I id) { return response(() -> baseService.findById(id)); }

common-base-service/src/main/java/edu/mi.general_idea: Add a protected helper method to wrap service calls in ResponseEntity and catch specific exceptions.
common-base-service/src/main/java/edu/mi.human_impl: protected ResponseEntity<?> response(Supplier<R> supplier) { try { return ResponseEntity.ok(supplier.get()); } catch(ResourceNotFoundException exception) { return ResponseEntity.notFound().build(); } }
